actors.name: User
actors.description: General external user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

actors.name: Validator Operator
actors.description: Entity running a validator node to secure the network.

actors.name: Protocol/Ecosystem Project
actors.description: Entity deploying dApps and Reward Vaults on Berachain.

actors.name: Guardian Multisig
actors.description: Group of elected signers providing oversight for governance proposals during timelock.

actors.name: Incentive Token Manager
actors.description: Wallet or entity authorized to manage incentive token deposits and rates for a specific Reward Vault.

assets.name: $BERA
assets.description: Native gas and staking token.

assets.name: $BGT
assets.description: Non-transferrable staking and governance token.

assets.name: $HONEY
assets.description: Native stablecoin soft-pegged to 1 USDC.

assets.name: Berachain NFTs
assets.description: Official NFT collections.

assets.name: Incentive Tokens
assets.description: Whitelisted ERC20 tokens offered by protocols to validators/boosters.

assets.name: LP Tokens
assets.description: Receipt tokens representing a user's share in a BEX liquidity pool.

assets.name: Receipt Tokens (PoL)
assets.description: Tokens received for productive activity, stakeable in Reward Vaults.

assets.name: Private Keys
assets.description: Used by wallets to access assets.

assets.name: Voting Power
assets.description: Governance power derived from holding/delegating BGT.

assets.name: Governance Proposals
assets.description: Data representing proposed changes to the protocol.

assets.name: Incentive Entitlement Proofs
assets.description: Data used to prove eligibility for claiming incentives/fees.

assets.name: $USDC
assets.description: Stablecoin collateral asset for HONEY.

assets.name: $BYUSD
assets.description: Stablecoin collateral asset for HONEY.

assets.name: $WETH
assets.description: Token used in BEX liquidity pools.

assets.name: $WBTC
assets.description: Token used in BEX liquidity pools.

assets.name: HONEY Vault Shares
assets.description: Represents user deposits in HONEY vaults.

assets.name: Reward Allocation Data
assets.description: Configuration data specifying how a validator directs BGT emissions.

assets.name: $WBERA
assets.description: Wrapped BERA token.

assets.name: Fee Shares
assets.description: Represents a portion of fees collected.

assets.name: Incentive Distribution Data
assets.description: Data about incentive distribution and user entitlements.

components.name: Validator Node
components.description: Participates in consensus, proposes blocks, directs emissions.

components.name: User Wallet
components.description: Allows users to access and manage assets on Berachain.

components.name: Berachain Bridge
components.description: Transfers tokens and NFTs between chains.

components.name: Berachain BEX (Smart Contracts)
components.description: Native DEX for trading and liquidity provision.

components.name: Berachain Honey Swap (Smart Contracts)
components.description: Native dApp for minting, burning, and swapping HONEY.

components.name: Berachain BeraHub (Frontend)
components.description: Web interface for interacting with dApps and PoL features.

components.name: Reward Vault (Smart Contract)
components.description: Contract for staking PoL-eligible assets to earn BGT.

components.name: Governance Contract
components.description: Manages the governance process, proposals, voting, and execution.

components.name: HoneyFactory (Smart Contract)
components.description: Central contract for HONEY minting and burning.

components.name: HONEY Vault (Smart Contract)
components.description: Collateral-specific vault holding assets for HONEY minting/redemption.

components.name: FeeCollector (Smart Contract)
components.description: Collects dApp fees and distributes them to BGT Boosters.

components.name: BGTIncentiveDistributor (Smart Contract)
components.description: Manages distribution and claiming of Incentive Tokens and fees for Boosters.

components.name: Incentive Distribution Backend Service
components.description: Off-chain service managing proofs of entitlement for incentive claiming.

components.name: BeaconKit
components.description: Modular consensus layer framework integrating Execution Client with CometBFT.

components.name: Execution Client (EVM)
components.description: Executes transactions and manages the EVM state.

data_flows.description: User sends transaction to the network
User initiates bridging of assets
Bridge deposits assets onto Berachain
User provides liquidity or swaps tokens on BEX
BEX sends swapped tokens or LP tokens to user
User deposits collateral to mint HONEY or swaps tokens
Honey Swap sends minted HONEY or swapped tokens to user
User stakes assets in a Reward Vault
User claims earned BGT from Reward Vault
User delegates BGT, votes, or submits governance proposal
User provides proof to claim incentives/fees
User receives claimed Incentive Tokens
Validator proposes a new block to the network
Validator receives transaction fees from the network
Validator receives base BGT emission for block production
Validator directs variable BGT emissions to chosen Reward Vaults
Validator receives commission on incentives from Reward Vault
BEX sends collected fees to FeeCollector
Honey Swap sends collected fees to FeeCollector
FeeCollector distributes fees (auctioned for WBERA) to the Distributor
User claims their share of dApp fees from the Distributor
User deposits collateral to HoneyFactory for minting
HoneyFactory routes collateral to specific HONEY Vault
HONEY Vault issues shares to HoneyFactory
HoneyFactory mints and sends HONEY to user
User sends HONEY to HoneyFactory for burning/redemption
HoneyFactory routes HONEY to HONEY Vault for redemption
HONEY Vault releases collateral to HoneyFactory
HoneyFactory sends redeemed collateral to user
Execution Client provides executed block data to CometBFT
CometBFT provides consensus data to the Execution Client
Validator Node provides transactions to the Execution Client for processing
Execution Client returns executed block data to the Validator Node
Backend service provides proofs to the user's wallet
BEX issues LP tokens to users
HONEY Vault sends fee shares to HoneyFactory
HoneyFactory sends fee shares to the fee receiver (FeeCollector)
Reward Vault sends incentives to distributor for boosters
User claims their share of dApp fees from the Distributor
BGTIncentiveDistributor provides data to the backend service for calculating and generating incentive entitlement proofs

trust_boundaries.name: User Wallet Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Protects user's private keys and assets from the public network

trust_boundaries.name: Berachain Network Perimeter
trust_boundaries.description: Protects the core blockchain network from external interactions

trust_boundaries.name: Bridge Trust Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates Berachain from external chains via the bridge

trust_boundaries.name: Smart Contract Interaction Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Protects smart contract logic and state from direct external manipulation

trust_boundaries.name: Governance Timelock Security
trust_boundaries.description: Provides a delay for Guardian oversight before proposal execution

trust_boundaries.name: Incentive Proof Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates off-chain proof generation from on-chain incentive claiming

trust_boundaries.name: Consensus-Execution Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Defines the interface and trust between transaction execution and block finality

behaviors.name: Connect Wallet
behaviors.description: User connects their wallet to interact with dApps/network

behaviors.name: Interact with Frontend
behaviors.description: User uses the BeraHub interface

behaviors.name: Bridge Assets
behaviors.description: User transfers assets via the bridge

behaviors.name: Swap Tokens (BEX)
behaviors.description: User exchanges tokens on BEX

behaviors.name: Provide Liquidity (BEX)
behaviors.description: User deposits tokens into BEX liquidity pool

behaviors.name: Mint HONEY
behaviors.description: User deposits collateral to mint HONEY

behaviors.name: Burn HONEY
behaviors.description: User redeems collateral by burning HONEY

behaviors.name: Stake Assets (Reward Vault)
behaviors.description: User stakes PoL-eligible assets in a Reward Vault

behaviors.name: Claim BGT
behaviors.description: User claims earned BGT from a Reward Vault

behaviors.name: Delegate BGT (Boost)
behaviors.description: User delegates BGT to a validator to boost emissions

behaviors.name: Vote on Proposal
behaviors.description: User casts a vote on a governance proposal

behaviors.name: Create Proposal
behaviors.description: User submits a new governance proposal

behaviors.name: Claim Incentives/Fees
behaviors.description: User claims earned Incentive Tokens or dApp fees by providing proof

behaviors.name: Operate Validator Node
behaviors.description: Validator operator runs the validator software

behaviors.name: Propose Block
behaviors.description: Validator node creates and proposes a new block for consensus

behaviors.name: Direct BGT Emissions
behaviors.description: Validator node allocates BGT emissions to chosen Reward Vaults

behaviors.name: Set Commission Rate
behaviors.description: Validator operator sets their incentive commission rate on the node

behaviors.name: Deploy Reward Vault
behaviors.description: Protocol deploys a new Reward Vault contract onto the blockchain

behaviors.name: Submit RFRV Proposal
behaviors.description: Protocol submits a proposal to whitelist a Reward Vault

behaviors.name: Deposit Incentives
behaviors.description: Token Manager adds incentive tokens to a Reward Vault

behaviors.name: Cancel Governance Proposal
behaviors.description: Guardians cancel a malicious governance proposal during timelock

behaviors.name: Generate Incentive Proofs
behaviors.description: Backend service generates proofs of entitlement for incentive claiming

behaviors.name: Execute Transaction
behaviors.description: Execution Client processes and executes transactions on the blockchain state

behaviors.name: Achieve Consensus
behaviors.description: CometBFT finalizes blocks and achieves consensus on the blockchain state

behaviors.name: Receive Transaction Fees
behaviors.description: Validator receives transaction fees for including transactions in blocks

behaviors.name: Receive Base BGT Emission
behaviors.description: Validator receives base BGT emission for proposing a block

behaviors.name: Receive Incentive Commission
behaviors.description: Validator receives commission on incentive tokens from Reward Vaults

behaviors.name: Collect Fees (BEX)
behaviors.description: BEX collects fees from user interactions and sends them to the FeeCollector

behaviors.name: Collect Fees (Honey Swap)
behaviors.description: Honey Swap collects fees from user interactions and sends them to the FeeCollector

behaviors.name: Distribute Fees
behaviors.description: FeeCollector distributes collected fees (as WBERA) to the BGTIncentiveDistributor

behaviors.name: Distribute Incentives/Fees
behaviors.description: BGTIncentiveDistributor makes incentives and fees available for users to claim

behaviors.name: Stake BERA
behaviors.description: Validator operator stakes BERA to become eligible for the active set

behaviors.name: Manage Incentive Rates
behaviors.description: Incentive Token Manager deposits incentives and sets/updates incentive rates for a Reward Vault
